elements.text: Your family loves to talk about big future life events like weddings and once-in-a-decade vacations. Recently, these conversations have made you feel uneasy, since you can't predict how your disease will progress. You consider withdrawing from these conversations, and ultimately decide that it's best if you...

elements.incorrect_feedback: Whoops! That doesn't look right. Please wait a moment and try again.

elements.text: The more you immerse yourself in the story, the more likely you are to benefit from our program – really picture yourself in the situation at hand.
